message:
Add mock toolchain tests and apply formatting fixes

Mock Module Tests:
- Add test_mock_config_toolchain_install_failure() to verify
  MockConfig::toolchain_install_failure() constructor
- Add test_mock_config_no_rustup() to verify MockConfig::no_rustup()
  constructor
- Add test_mock_ssh_client_no_rustup() async test to verify rustup
  command interception returns "command not found" with exit code 127
- Add test_mock_ssh_client_toolchain_install_failure() to verify
  toolchain install commands fail with appropriate error
- Add test_mock_ssh_client_toolchain_run_failure() to verify
  rustup run commands fail when toolchain install is simulated

Formatting Fixes (rustfmt):
- patterns_security_test.rs: whitespace normalization
- ssh.rs: format warn!() macro calls with proper line breaks
- cache.rs: format warn!() call, add newline at end of file
- toolchain.rs: consolidate assert_eq!() macro formatting

These tests provide complete coverage for the mock toolchain failure
scenarios added for e2e testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
